description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the eidheim/testing Docker image and runs a before_script that creates a build directory, sets CXXFLAGS to -Werror and enables CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE. Define a single test job in the test stage that executes the following commands in order: `scan-build-6.0 cmake .. && scan-build-6.0 --status-bugs make`, then `rm -r *`, then `CXX=clang++-6.0 cmake .. && make`, then `rm -r *`, then `CXX=g++ cmake .. && make && make test`. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
